assignment.name: ml_notebook
assignment.title: Train and evaluate a small image classifier on CIFAR-10
assignment.description: Produce a Jupyter notebook that loads CIFAR-10, trains an image classifier from scratch, and reports test accuracy with a confusion matrix and at least one ablation comparing two design choices.
constraints: Single notebook, runnable end-to-end on a free Colab T4 in under 30 minutes.
No pretrained weights; the model must be trained from scratch.
Final reported test accuracy must exceed 70%.
Include one ablation study (e.g. with vs. without data augmentation).
All hyperparameters declared in a single config cell at the top.

recommended_plan: Compare no augmentation vs. standard augmentation (random crops, horizontal flips)

tasks.title: Set up notebook structure and import libraries
tasks.deliverable: Notebook skeleton with all required imports (torch, torchvision, numpy, matplotlib, sklearn)

tasks.title: Create config cell with all hyperparameters
tasks.deliverable: Single config cell defining: learning rate, batch size, num epochs, augmentation flags, model architecture params, random seed

tasks.title: Implement data loading pipeline
tasks.deliverable: Functions to load CIFAR-10 train/test sets with configurable augmentation transforms (no-aug and standard-aug variants)

tasks.title: Implement ResNet-18 from scratch or use minimal torchvision definition
tasks.deliverable: ResNet-18 model class callable with input shape (batch, 3, 32, 32) → (batch, 10)

tasks.title: Implement training loop with validation
tasks.deliverable: train_epoch() and validate() functions that run one epoch and return loss/accuracy; include early stopping or checkpointing

tasks.title: Train model without augmentation (ablation A)
tasks.deliverable: Trained model checkpoint, training history (loss/acc curves) for no-augmentation run

tasks.title: Train model with standard augmentation (ablation B)
tasks.deliverable: Trained model checkpoint, training history (loss/acc curves) for augmentation run

tasks.title: Evaluate both models on test set
tasks.deliverable: Test accuracy scores and per-class predictions for both ablation variants

tasks.title: Generate confusion matrices and ablation comparison plot
tasks.deliverable: Two confusion matrices (one per ablation), side-by-side training curves, and ablation summary table showing accuracy delta

tasks.title: Assemble final notebook with markdown documentation
tasks.deliverable: Complete, runnable Jupyter notebook with section headers, method descriptions, results interpretation, and ablation conclusion

tasks.title: Validation run and timing check on Colab T4
tasks.deliverable: Confirmed notebook executes end-to-end in <30 min, achieves >70% test accuracy, all outputs render correctly

open_risks: ResNet-18 may not reach 70% on CIFAR-10 from scratch in 30 min without careful hyperparameter tuning; may need to increase training time or reduce model capacity and test iteratively
Colab T4 performance variance could cause timing overruns; recommend profiling early (task 6) and adjusting batch size or epochs if needed
Ablation difference (no-aug vs. aug) might be marginal (<3%); if so, results should still be reported honestly but consider whether methodology/architecture tuning is needed
Memory constraints on free Colab may limit batch size; monitor during task 6 and adjust config before task 7 if OOM occurs
Confusion matrix visualization for 10 classes can be hard to read; recommend applying normalization and colormap tuning in task 9
